name: Margaret T.
reviewText: The SCOTS team took the time to really understand my knee pain and helped me find exercises that actually work. I was worried I needed surgery but the structured rehab program has made such a difference.

name: David R.
reviewText: Excellent service. The physiotherapist explained everything clearly and gave me a realistic plan. After 8 weeks of targeted exercise, my hip mobility improved significantly.

name: Sarah L.
reviewText: I appreciated the thorough assessment and honest advice about my shoulder condition. The education program was informative and gave me confidence to manage my symptoms.

name: James W.
reviewText: Professional and caring team. They identified that I did need a surgical referral and made sure the process was smooth. Grateful for the efficient pathway.
